rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.1092, which governs the composition of a housing and health services coordination council.
quote: Sec. 2306.1092. COMPOSITION. (a) The department shall establish a housing and health services coordination council.
_note: No conflict: the rule concerns council membership composition, not property tax exemptions or homestead appraisal values.
